case_title: KEITH GABRIEL VS. VIRGIN MOBILE USA L.P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,265.00 FILED BY GABRIEL, KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT VIRGIN MOBILE USA L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GABRIEL, KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT VIRGIN MOBILE USA L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -STAMPED SIGNATURE SERVED FEB-10-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIRGIN MOBILE USA L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GABRIEL, KEITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIRGIN MOBILE USA L.P. $1,253.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,298.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VIRGIN MOBILE USA L.P.
